reason: Successfully verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to a URL, and retrieve page information, returning the correct page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - The Super Agent interface loaded successfully with the agents list visible in the sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260430-165525-obe5" agent in the sidebar - The agent opened and displayed the chat interface with message input box
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input textbox - Message was successfully entered in the textbox
Clicked the "Send message" button - The message was sent and the agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - The agent completed processing in 8 seconds and returned a response

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" - The response clearly states: "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." with two successful tool call cards shown (Open Browser and Browser Command), and the browser preview panel on the right displays the actual Example Domain page
